BLOG.HERO.TITLE: Modern Microservices Template
BLOG.HERO.SUBTITLE: Event-driven architecture with Kafka, Kubernetes orchestration and Spring Security.
BLOG.STATUS: 🚧 Project in development — content constantly updated
BLOG.INTRO.TEXT: This template is designed as a foundation for scalable web applications. It integrates multiple key technologies in the cloud-native ecosystem with best practices from the start.
BLOG.TECH.KAFKA.TITLE: Apache Kafka
BLOG.TECH.KAFKA.DESC: Distributed messaging platform based on events that allows decoupling services.
BLOG.TECH.KAFKA.USE: Used to communicate microservices through asynchronous events, improving system resilience and scalability.
BLOG.TECH.KUBERNETES.TITLE: Kubernetes
BLOG.TECH.KUBERNETES.DESC: Container orchestration system that automates deployment and scaling.
BLOG.TECH.KUBERNETES.USE: Manages microservices, enabling automatic scaling, load balancing and high availability.
BLOG.TECH.SPRINGBOOT.TITLE: Spring Boot
BLOG.TECH.SPRINGBOOT.DESC: Framework for creating microservices in Java quickly and structured.
BLOG.TECH.SPRINGBOOT.USE: Used as the foundation for each service, facilitating REST APIs and decoupled business logic.
BLOG.TECH.SPRINGSECURITY.TITLE: Spring Security
BLOG.TECH.SPRINGSECURITY.DESC: Security framework for authentication and authorization.
BLOG.TECH.SPRINGSECURITY.USE: Protects endpoints via JWT, role control and centralized authentication.
BLOG.TECH.DOCKER.TITLE: Docker
BLOG.TECH.DOCKER.DESC: Container platform that allows packaging applications.
BLOG.TECH.DOCKER.USE: Each microservice runs in its own container, ensuring consistency across environments.
BLOG.TECH.APIGATEWAY.TITLE: API Gateway
BLOG.TECH.APIGATEWAY.DESC: Single entry point for all services.
BLOG.TECH.APIGATEWAY.USE: Manages routing, authentication and traffic control.
BLOG.FLOW.TITLE: Architecture Flow
BLOG.FLOW.TEXT: The client makes a request → passes through the API Gateway → authenticates with Spring Security → the service processes the logic → an event is generated in Kafka → other services react.
